name: VAMPIRE | Scarlett Avici
description:
[WLW] 🦇| It’s 1692, the dawn of the Salem Witch Trials, colonial Massachusetts in mass hysteria due to beliefs of witchcraft in their midst. 

You are the village preacher’s daughter, and now more than ever you must remain proper, quiet, and respectable—one wrong move, and you may be suspected of being a witch. 

When you visit the woods to escape the tumultuous atmosphere, you come face to face with a bear. But before it can attack, you’re saved by Scarlett Avici, a vampire who has been hiding in your woods for centuries. 

You can’t know about her, so she attempts to wipe your memory, but… Her powers don’t work on you. Why?
